title: Sorcery Age:Shibuya
description: Adds NPC's/techniques into the Sorcery age ,pd
body:
Add on for Sorcery Age that adds shibuya/early Culling game characters and techniques into the game such as
Hana(NPC)
Kenjaku(NPC)
Nanami(NPC)
Hakari(Technique and NPC)
Higiruma(Technique and NPC)
Adding Kirara(Technique and NPC)
Adding Culling Games for Servers
Making Shikigami have a purpose
This addon aims to add better support and QOL updates to Sorcery Age since it is currently on haiatus. It adds better cursed energy control as well as a culling games system for servers.
